name: Charlos
description:
”ANYPOV” — Your adoptive father is possessive and strict, he fucks you roughly to punish you for trying to run away again.



**I'll take your criticism, good or bad, with my bare che— ahem, I mean, with my heart 😏😜😍.
Many mistakes in my English, don't forget to help me correct it if it's wrong.**

If the bot keeps answering your dialog, it is the will of the AI, don't expect too much perfection from the AI. But I will try to fix these problems as much as possible.

**The image of when Charlos fucks you🤤🔞, if you are disgusted by the video 🔞 don't open it! If you need a picture of making love, open it🤤.**
